_meta.description: Master index for the AD&D 2e reference data files. Describes the structure and contents of each file for use in a character sheet web application.

files.description: Complete ability score tables for all six abilities (STR, DEX, CON, INT, WIS, CHA) from scores 1–25, including all modifiers. Also includes exceptional strength (STR 18/xx), character generation methods.
use_cases: Display ability score modifier tables on character sheet
Show WIS bonus spell slots for priests
Show INT spell-learning chance for wizards

files.description: All seven core playable races (Human, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Half-Elf, Halfling, Half-Orc) with ability score adjustments, limits, allowed classes, level limits, infravision, movement, special abilities, and saving throw bonuses. Also includes multiclass and dual-class rules.
use_cases: Auto-apply ability score adjustments on character creation
Show level limits for demihuman classes
Calculate saving throw bonuses from CON (dwarves, gnomes, halflings)

files.description: All core character classes (Fighter, Paladin, Ranger, Mage, Specialist Wizards, Cleric, Druid, Thief, Bard) with requirements, hit dice, armor/weapon restrictions, proficiency slots, THAC0 group, saving throw tables, XP tables, spell tables, thief skills, and special abilities.
use_cases: Auto-calculate THAC0 from class and level
Look up saving throws by class and level
Build XP tracker with level-up detection
Display spells per day for caster classes
Calculate thief skill points and base percentages

files.description: Combat rules: combat sequence, attack resolution, damage, special actions (charging, two-weapon fighting, grappling, retreating), missile combat, cover rules, turning undead table, morale, surprise, conditions, and damage types.
use_cases: Auto-calculate to-hit roll needed from THAC0 vs. AC
Turning undead lookup table by cleric level
Combat tracker for initiative and HP

files.description: Complete weapon tables (39 melee, 11 missile weapons) with damage vs. S/M and L, speed factor, type, size, weight, space required, cost, and notes. All armor types with AC, weight, movement, and cost. Shield types. Encumbrance rules.
use_cases: Weapon selection and display on character sheet
Auto-load weapon stats when weapon is selected
Encumbrance calculator from carried weight vs. STR
Quick-reference for weapon damage in combat

files.description: Weapon and non-weapon proficiency systems. Includes all weapon proficiencies with groups, specialization rules, and slot tables by class. Non-weapon proficiencies organized by group (General, Warrior, Wizard, Priest, Rogue) with relevant ability, check modifier, and slot cost. Racial thief skill adjustments and DEX adjustments for thief skills.
use_cases: Proficiency selection UI for character creation
Roll proficiency checks against ability scores
Thief skill adjustment calculator by race and DEX

files.description: Complete wizard spell list from 1st through 9th level (all PHB spells). Each spell includes school, level, range, duration, area of effect, components, casting time, saving throw, description, material component, and reversal info where applicable. Covers all standard wizard spells plus named spells (Bigby's, Mordenkainen's, Tenser's, etc.).
use_cases: Spell selection and tracking for wizard characters
Spellbook management — track which spells are known
Filter spells by school for specialist wizards
Show available spells by level for current wizard level

files.description: Complete cleric and druid spell list from 1st through 7th level (all PHB spells). Each spell includes sphere, level, range, duration, area of effect, components, casting time, saving throw, description, material component, and reversal info. Druid-specific spells are noted.
use_cases: Spell selection and tracking for priest characters
Daily prayer and spell slot management
Filter spells by sphere for specialty priests
Show WIS bonus spells added to base slots

files.description: Character kits from the Complete Handbook series (PHBR1-PHBR15). Includes fighter, thief, wizard, priest, ranger, paladin, bard, druid, and psionicist kits. Also includes fighting styles and weapon groups from the Complete Fighter's Handbook.
use_cases: Show required proficiencies for each kit

files.description: Complete adventuring equipment, tools, clothing, mounts, vehicles, and services with prices. Covers currency system, starting equipment by class, adventuring gear, animals and mounts, transportation, lodging, and services.
use_cases: Gem and art object valuation for treasure

files.description: Magic item tables and descriptions from the DMG. Includes potions, scrolls, rings, rods/staves/wands, miscellaneous magic items, and magic weapons/armor. Covers identification rules, curses, charges, and random generation tables.

Expanded spell system from the Tome of Magic. Includes Wild Magic rules, wild surge table, wild mage spells, chronomancer spells, shadow magic spells, song magic (bard), geomancy spells, new priest spheres, and additional wizard/priest spells.

Additional weapons beyond the PHB from the Arms & Equipment Guide and Complete Fighter's Handbook. Includes all polearm varieties, exotic weapons, eastern/oriental weapons, siege weapons, primitive firearms, chain/flail variants, and additional bow types. Also covers improvised weapons and special materials.
use_cases: Expanded weapon selection for character sheets
Siege weapon stats for battlefield encounters
Eastern weapon selection for oriental campaigns
Special material properties and cost multipliers

files.description: Complete psionic system from the Complete Psionicist's Handbook. Covers PSP rules, power scores, psionic combat (attack/defense modes), and all 6 disciplines: Clairsentience, Psychokinesis, Psychometabolism, Psychoportation, Telepathy, and Metapsionics. Each discipline contains all sciences and devotions with costs.
Additional non-weapon proficiencies from the Complete Handbook series beyond the PHB. Organized by class group (Warrior, Rogue, Wizard, Priest, General). Also includes secondary skills.
use_cases: Expanded NWP selection during character creation

files.description: Non-PHB player character races from various campaign settings. Includes Planescape planar races (Aasimar, Tiefling, Githzerai, Githyanki, Genasi), Dark Sun races (Mul, Thri-Kreen), Complete Book of Humanoids races (Bugbear, Gnoll, Goblin, Hobgoblin, Kobold, Lizard Man, Ogre, Orc), Al-Qadim races, Spelljammer races, and rare demi-human subraces (Drow, Gray Elf, Wild Elf, Deep Gnome, etc.).

Additional character classes beyond the PHB. Includes the Psionicist (PHBR5), Shaman (PHBR12), Witch Doctor (PHBR12), Sha'ir (Al-Qadim), Crusader (PHBR3), Monk (Oriental Adventures), and the full specialty priest system from the Complete Priest's Handbook with all spheres and example specialty priests.
use_cases: Psionicist class character creation and leveling
Sphere system reference for priest characters
Expanded multiclass options for exotic races

quick_reference.to_hit_formula: Roll d20; hit if result >= (THAC0 - target_AC)
quick_reference.attack_formula_example: Fighter level 5 (THAC0 16) vs. AC 4: needs 16-4=12 or higher on d20
quick_reference.death: Character dies at 0 HP (or -10 HP with optional negative HP rule)
quick_reference.ability_check: Roll d20 equal to or under ability score to succeed
quick_reference.saving_throw: Roll d20 equal to or over saving throw target number to succeed
quick_reference.proficiency_check: Roll d20 equal to or under (ability score + modifier) to succeed

character_creation_flow: 2. Choose race (races.json — adjustments; races_additional.json for setting races)
3. Choose class(es) based on race + scores (classes.json, classes_additional.json)
4. Optionally select a kit (kits.json — bonus proficiencies, special benefits)
5. Record starting HP (class hit die + CON modifier from ability_scores.json)
6. Select weapon proficiencies (proficiencies.json — slots by class)
10. Select starting spells if spellcaster (spells_wizard.json, spells_priest.json, spells_tome_of_magic.json)
11. If Psionicist: set PSPs, select disciplines and powers (psionics.json)

cross_references.thief_racial_adjustments: proficiencies.json → nonweapon_proficiencies.thief_skills in classes.json reference proficiencies.json racial tables
cross_references.saving_throw_racial_bonuses: races.json saving_throw_bonuses cross-reference with ability_scores.json CON table
cross_references.wisdom_bonus_spells: ability_scores.json WIS table → classes.json cleric/druid spell tables
cross_references.str_exceptional: ability_scores.json STR exceptional rows apply only to Fighter class from classes.json
